plugins.name: social-credit
plugins.description: Quietly tracks how kindly you treat Claude across sessions. Receipts notarized to the Bitcoin blockchain.

plugins.name: superpowers-for-shopping
plugins.description: Low-friction shopping. /cart "a new sweater" → spinner → 5 picks already in real carts at the retailers → one Review button. No thumbs, no decisions, no nudges.

plugins.name: pixterm-claude-code
plugins.description: Pose-graph authoring skills for pixterm: agent-driven motion-prompt authoring on edges (/suggest-prompt), guided character authoring through Phases A-F (/design-character), collision-safe ADR creation (/adr-new), harness utilities.

plugins.name: omakase-harness
plugins.description: Inject a personal harness into any existing repo as a Claude Code plugin: overlay your rules, docs, and gates at real paths, keep them out of git, and run gates on your git hooks via lefthook. Additive and reversible — zero committed footprint.

plugins.name: pixterm-harness
plugins.description: pixterm's personal harness, built on the omakase-harness injector. Overlays pixterm's guards (worktree-discipline, adr-required, the visual-verify deferred gate) into the repo at real paths, keeps them out of git, and runs them on your git hooks via lefthook. Additive and reversible — zero committed footprint.
